column1: The pipes under the kitchen sink have been leaking for three weeks and the cupboard is completely waterlogged and damaged.
I am writing to formally complain about the excessive noise from the flat above us every night between 11pm and 3am.
My deposit refund has not been processed after 6 weeks. I was told it would take 10 working days.
The communal stairwell lighting has been broken for two months and it is a safety hazard especially for elderly residents.
We are absolutely delighted with how quickly the team responded to our repair request. Excellent service.
There is black mould covering the entire bathroom ceiling and my daughter has developed a respiratory condition as a result.
The parking allocation system is unfair and residents are constantly having disputes over spaces.
Our heating system completely broke down during the coldest week of the year and we had no heat for five days.
I would like to apply for a rent reduction as the property has been in a poor state of repair for over a year.
The new community centre facilities are fantastic and have really brought the neighbourhood together.
A window in the childrens bedroom has been broken for four weeks. Cold air is coming in and the children are getting sick.
We received a bill for repairs that were never carried out. I have photos proving the work was not done.
The lift in our building has been out of service for three months. I am on the 8th floor and I am disabled.
The garden maintenance team have done an incredible job this season. The grounds look beautiful.
Raw sewage is backing up into our bathroom. This started two days ago and the smell is unbearable.
